steps.title: Write the line
steps.content:
The table pattern gives a $y$-intercept of $27$, so the line is:
$$y=-\frac{1}{27}x+27$$

steps.title: Set the output to zero
steps.content:
At the $x$-intercept, $y=0$. Solve for $x$:
$$0=-\frac{1}{27}x+27$$
$$\frac{1}{27}x=27$$
$$x=729$$
The answer is D.
